mapper.select:
SELECT R.ID, R.REQ_NO, R.ITEM_NM, R.CATE_CD, R.CATE_NM, R.SPEC, R.UNIT_CD, R.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, R.CREATED_ITEM_CD, R.REG_ID FROM IT_ITEM_REQ R LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='IR_STS' AND S.CD=R.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE R.DEL_YN='N'
AND (R.REQ_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR R.ITEM_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%')
AND R.STS=#{sts} ORDER BY R.ID DESC

SELECT R.ID, R.COMP_CD, R.REQ_NO, R.ITEM_NM, R.ITEM_NM_EN, R.CATE_CD, R.CATE_NM, R.SPEC, R.UNIT_CD, R.ITEM_TYP, R.TAX_TYP, R.REQ_DESC, R.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, R.CREATED_ITEM_CD, R.REMARK, R.REG_ID FROM IT_ITEM_REQ R LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='IR_STS' AND S.CD=R.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE R.ID=#{id} AND R.DEL_YN='N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO IT_ITEM_REQ (COMP_CD, REQ_NO, ITEM_NM, ITEM_NM_EN, CATE_CD, CATE_NM, SPEC, UNIT_CD, ITEM_TYP, TAX_TYP, REQ_DESC, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{reqNo}, #{itemNm}, #{itemNmEn}, #{cateCd}, #{cateNm}, #{spec}, #{unitCd}, #{itemTyp}, NVL(#{taxTyp},'TAX'), #{reqDesc}, NVL(#{sts},'REQ'), #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE IT_ITEM_REQ SET STS=#{sts}, CREATED_ITEM_CD=NVL(#{createdItemCd}, CREATED_ITEM_CD), MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE IT_ITEM_REQ SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ATTR_NM, ATTR_VAL FROM IT_ITEM_REQ_ATTR WHERE REQ_ID=#{reqId} ORDER BY ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO IT_ITEM_REQ_ATTR (REQ_ID, ATTR_NM, ATTR_VAL) VALUES (#{reqId}, #{attrNm}, #{attrVal})
